articles.title: YouTube Found Guilty in the Bitcoin Scam Lawsuit
articles.description: Apple co-founder Steve Wozniak has won the ongoing Bitcoin Scam lawsuit against YouTube since 2020. The High Court has dismissed the decision of the lower court in the BTC Scam lawsuit, which had absolved YouTube of any responsibility in the matter. It should be noted that fake videos were created using footage of Apple co-founder Steve Wozniak in the Bitcoin Scam. These videos claimed to...

articles.title: Coin base’s CLO Paul Grewal Stands Firm in Ethereum’s Defense Against SEC
articles.description: Amid escalating regulatory scrutiny surrounding Ethereum (ETH), Paul Grewal, Chief Legal Officer (CLO) at Coinbase, has stepped forward to counter misinformation and defend the cryptocurrency’s status within the broader crypto landscape. Grewal’s assertions come in response to reports suggesting the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is pushing to classify Ethereum as a security,...

articles.title: Can Nuclear Power Be Used for Crypto Mining? A Complete Guide
articles.description: As interests in crypto assets like Ethereum boom throughout the world, the environmental influence of cryptocurrency mining has become a pressing concern. This is because of the immense computational power required for the complex cryptographic calculations underpinning crypto transactions and security.
